11/14/25 AC 61-65K
Appendix A
A-7
SAMPLE ENDORSEMENTS
The following examples are recommended sample endorsements for use by authorized instructors.
PREREQUISITES FOR THE PRACTICAL TEST ENDORSEMENT
A.1 Prerequisites for practical test: 14 CFR § 61.39(a)(6)(i) and (ii).
I certify that [Name] has received and logged training time within
2 calendar months preceding the month of application.
A.2 Review of deficiencies identified on airman knowledge test: 14 CFR § 61.39(a)(6)(iii).
I certify that [Name] reviewed deficiencies from the airman knowledge test.
STUDENT PILOT ENDORSEMENTS
A.3 Pre-solo aeronautical knowledge: 14 CFR § 61.87(b).
I certify that [Name] completed the pre-solo knowledge test.
Appendix B.
